'''Asli Krimsan''' was a plump [[Humanoid/Legends|Humanoid]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] with black hair who was fond of wearing a burgundy cloak. She lived thousands of years before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] and trained [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] for over 200 years.<ref name="JJK:KB">''[[Junior Jedi Knights: Kenobi's Blade]]''</ref> Krimsan later created a [[Asli Krimsan's holocron|holocron]]. A lecture by [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] was recorded in this [[Holocron/Legends|holocron]] before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="JedivsSith" />

[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] kept Asli Krimsan's holocron in [[Bast Castle]] on [[Vjun/Legends|Vjun]] following the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]].<ref name="JJK:VF" /> In [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]],<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> it was found by the [[Jedi historian]] [[Tionne Solusar]], the [[Kushiban]] Master [[Ikrit]], and Jedi trainees [[Anakin Solo]], [[Tahiri Veila]] and [[Uldir Lochett]].<ref name="JJK:VF" />
